owner_review.primary_blocker: quantity-matched repeated-single-source was an equivalence-permitted scope diagnostic but I04 promoted it to a required-divergence primary comparator
load_bearing_questions: why could quantity-matched one-source repetition require divergence under source-label-invariant pool theory
what does a no-runtime matched null actually calibrate
is the response window fixed independently of arrival
can anything other than the registered response change B

choice_authorities.role: quantity-matched scope diagnostic, carrier-changing controls, response semantics, and claim boundary

static_findings: feedback-surface emission records live-state evidence and does not mutate coherence or enqueue work
produce_events schedules eligible work and does not process packet coherence changes
the feedback producer schedules exactly one departure event when eligible
step processes exactly one earliest deterministic queued event or returns an empty-queue result
arrival local update can schedule outbound routes, so B must have no causal flux route in the scientific window
departure debits the packet source and queues its arrival
arrival adds exactly packet.amount to the target coherence
with an initially empty queue and no other producers, two step calls process the response departure then arrival

primary_comparator.candidate: both physical contributions q1 and q2 enter the common carrier
branches: q1 enters the common carrier while q2 is source-debited and diverted to a matched inert sink
q2 enters the common carrier while q1 is source-debited and diverted to a matched inert sink
primary_comparator.paired_comparator_response: maximum oriented B response of the two leave-one-admitted branches within the same mode, seed, and physical order stratum
primary_comparator.reason: the fixed maximum tests the candidate against the strongest symmetric marginal carrier while both source activities remain matched; it changes P, H_P, or both and is not chosen post-outcome
primary_comparator.raw_branch_retention: both leave-one-admitted responses and the derived maximum remain visible

preserve: q1 and q2 amount, registered type, target-carrier operation, and physical order
complete mode-relevant P and/or H_P/M_H carrier state/history
total source-side cost, depletion, support, timing, opportunity, response policy, and B baseline
quantity_matched_scope_diagnostic.registration_duty: prove each source can emit both operations with matched route class, cost, reserve, capacity, support, and eligibility; otherwise the diagnostic cannot register
quantity_matched_scope_diagnostic.R03_rule: numerical equivalence alone cannot fail R03; only evidence that the actual candidate was not jointly constituted or bypassed the common carrier can establish full single-source explanation

order_interpretation.top_aligned_signature: all three seeds align in both physical order strata
order_interpretation.order_conditioned_or_mixed: at least one physical order has a resolved primary relation and the registered OP-08 order control passes while the other order is different, resolution-limited, or counter-directional
order_interpretation.fail_closed_separation: not_top_aligned is not identical to mode_hypothesis_failed; carrier-chain and control failures decide causal failure

null_scope.calibrates: deterministic rational parsing, float conversion, normalized-margin arithmetic, serialization, and byte reconstruction in the pure analysis pipeline

I06_numeric_admissibility.response_packet_amount_rule: r must be at least 1024 times the raw floor and at least 1024 times max(ulp(B_before), ulp(B_before+r)) for every registered branch
I06_numeric_admissibility.roundtrip_rule: B_before, r, and B_before+r must be finite, canonical-JSON round-trippable, and the recomputed B gain must remain positive
I06_numeric_admissibility.runtime_tolerance_rule: every runtime/restoration/continuation tolerance is separately registered in I06, cannot be inferred from analysis_arithmetic_delta, and must be smaller than r/1024
I06_numeric_admissibility.failure_effect: the affected configuration cannot register; changing the analysis floor or response definition reopens I04/I05

preconditions: contributions, interventions, H_P/M_H materialization, and neutral contact are complete
packet queue and boundary-birth queue are empty
B is distinct from B_ref and every front-mask carrier
B has no causal flux route, balancing operation, background update, or topology integration enabled
B baseline and full response configuration are matched within each pairing
operation_slots: call produce_events with feedback-eligibility policy exactly once
capture B_after, queue identities, and event lineage
fixed_response_window.operational_exception_rule: an exception or incomplete slot sequence is operationally invalid and has null response; it cannot be converted to scientific zero
postconditions: packet queue and boundary-birth queue are empty
scheduled branch has exactly one A-to-B packet and its one B arrival
unscheduled/native-block branch has no response packet or B change
no event other than the registered response arrival targets or changes B

response_semantics.admissible_values: 0 or the one fixed registered response-packet amount within a configuration
response_semantics.interpretation: native response scheduling-and-arrival occurrence expressed as a receiving-substrate gain, not a graded magnitude claim
response_semantics.purity_failure: if any other operation can change B, the configuration cannot register under this response; changing to packet-attributable or background-subtracted response requires reopening I04

independent_per_mode: primary raw branches and six derived primary margins

required_evidence: actual response read masks and registered common/private carrier IDs
native producer call and production record
adapter call provenance and forbidden API trace
branch configuration identity and runtime-binding receipt
causal_chain_derivation.machine_rule: derive candidate chain validity and private/controller exclusion from record linkage and set relations; output inequality or an authored used_common_pool/controller_bypass field is never sufficient

forbidden_choice_sources: I03 runtime-conformance observations and response values
I03 branch outcomes, assertion results, implementation comparators, and digests

rationale_reconstruction.B_response: pre-runtime contracts freeze native later A-to-B transition; public source shows arrival changes B
rationale_reconstruction.fixed_window: public source shows producer scheduling plus one departure and one arrival event
rationale_reconstruction.primary_comparator: accepted brief requires carrier-changing contributor/freeze controls and permits quantity-matched equivalence
rationale_reconstruction.physical_orders: accepted history/hybrid causal contracts require order-sensitive carrier tests
rationale_reconstruction.control_derivation: accepted causal-factorization and mailbox/controller exclusions require evidence-linked paths
